title: Analytic Anchor-Speed Invariant from the q-6j Derivative

analytic_rule.q6j_derivative: termwise derivative of the finite Racah sum including Delta prefactors

validation.test_family_rule: contains at least one doubled-spin label 5 or 6 and is absent from the label-1-to-4 family set

stopping_rule: Evaluate once. Do not alter the derivative formula, atlas rule, reference steps or thresholds after seeing the result.

claim_firewall.allowed_if_passed: The declared two-channel q-6j anchor speed is reproduced by an explicit termwise analytic derivative on the independent new-label atlas.
forbidden: generalization beyond the declared regular chamber and two-channel class

evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
